batch_rows.note: Provider-batch summary: runtime is the sum of ten published task means. Cost is an unmetered rate-card estimate. Startup, teardown, retries, storage, network, plans, credits, and unmeasured preparation are excluded.

runtime_definition: Batch rows sum ten published task means. Replicate rows sum ten task samples carrying the same upstream replicate index. Neither includes sandbox startup, teardown, retries, or unmeasured task preparation.
